ns0:entry.ns0:title: [python] muratcankoylan/Agent-Skills-for-Context-Engineering
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/muratcankoylan/Agent-Skills-for-Context-Engineering
Language: python
A comprehensive collection of Agent Skills for context engineering, multi-agent architectures, and production agent systems. Use when building, optimizing, or debugging agent systems that require effective context management.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [javascript] CircuitVerse/CircuitVerse
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CircuitVerse/CircuitVerse
Language: javascript

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [javascript] liyupi/ai-guide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/liyupi/ai-guide
Language: javascript
程序员鱼皮的 AI 资源大全 + Vibe Coding 零基础教程，分享大模型选择指南（DeepSeek / GPT / Gemini / Claude）、最新 AI 资讯、Prompt 提示词大全、AI 知识百科（RAG / MCP / A2A）、AI 编程教程、AI 工具用法（Cursor / Claude Code / TRAE / Lovable / Agent Skills）、AI 开发框架教程（Spring AI / LangChain）、AI 产品变现指南，帮你快速掌握 AI 技术，走在时代前沿。本项目为开源文档版本，已升级为鱼皮 AI 导航网站
